blended.narrative: Sunday River is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light freezing drizzle, highs of 44°F.
Saturday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
